mapper.sql: id, name_cn, name_en, path, method, status, create_time, last_update_time, create_by, last_update_by
mapper.update: UPDATE openplatform_v2_api_t SET name_cn = #{nameCn}, name_en = #{nameEn}, status = #{status}, last_update_time = #{lastUpdateTime}, last_update_by = #{lastUpdateBy} WHERE id = #{id}
